item.title: This is a compilation of the beginning of this poor kittens journey. Watch to the end for the update. And visit Palm Springs Animal Shelter’s site for updates. It’s a good reminder to us all to support our local shelters and spay/neuter programs. #kittens
item.description: By @goth_girl_problems: This is a compilation of the beginning of this poor kittens journey. Watch to the end for the update. And visit Palm Springs Animal Shelter’s site for updates. It’s a good reminder to us all to support our local shelters and spay/neuter programs. #kittens

item.title: The boys got to meet lots of locals, most of whom were quite sweet and friendly to them. We saw at least 2 cats on nearly every block we walked. Unfortunately we didn’t have enough time to see more of Türkiye but we can’t wait to revisit this beautiful c
